name: design_table_polydispersity_room_T
description: Room-temperature deliverable-6 design table from log-normal radius smearing.

fields.name: sigma_geom
fields.description: Geometric standard deviation of the log-normal radius distribution.

fields.name: status
fields.description: Acceptance status for the (h, sigma_geom) design row.

fields.name: r_geom_mean_min_m
fields.description: Lower endpoint of the admissible geometric-mean radius interval.

fields.name: r_geom_mean_max_m
fields.description: Upper endpoint of the admissible geometric-mean radius interval.

fields.name: best_p_stratified
fields.description: Maximum smeared stratified probability on the §5 radius axis.

fields.name: max_truncation_loss
fields.description: Largest lost log-normal probability mass for this row.

fields.name: rejected_rbar_count
fields.description: Count of r_bar samples rejected by the truncation gate.
